ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2023 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing (Motions)
Off Calendar Sep-13-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter is on Calendar this day for Default Judgment Hearing as to Defendant Gordon Plastering, Inc., doing business as Gordon Plastering and Defendant Carl Gordon.

Dept. 505; Judge: Sylvia L. Husing; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 2:18 p.m., and concluded at 2:31 p.m. (D505)

William Petti, Esq. appeared for and on behalf of Plaintiff Flash Funding Services, Inc. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Gordon Plastering, Inc., doing business as Gordon Plastering not appearing.
Defendant Carl Gordon not appearing.
Witness for Plaintiff Melissa Brown was placed under oath and testified via Zoom Video Conference.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Written Agreement, Breach of Guarantee and Money Had and Received filed on January 19, 2022.
Proof of Substituted Service on Defendant Gordon Plastering, Inc., doing business as Gordon Plastering effectuated on March 24, 2022.
Proof of Substituted Service on Defendant Carl Gordon effectuated on March 25, 2022.
Does 1 through 5 dismissed on June 13, 2022.
Motion for Default Prove-up hearing filed January 25, 2023.
Plaintiff's Notice of Hearing and Notice of Damages filed August 15, 2023.

The Plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s for the Court's review:

Exhibit A: Agreement
Exhibit B: Copy of Communications of Plaintiff to merchant.
Exhibit C: Copy of Defendant's pay history.

The matter is submitted.

The Court rules in favor of Flash Funding Services, Inc. and against Defendant Gordon Plastering, Inc., doing business as Gordon Plastering and Defendant Carl Gordon as follows:

Damages: $31,910.00
Interest: $5,761.31
Attorney's Fees: $3,974.00
Costs: $572.00

Proposed Judgment signed and filed this date.

MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for default judgment prove-up hearing.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:30:08 a.m. and concluding at 09:34:03 a.m.

Plaintiff Flash Funding Services, Inc. represented by William Petti, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Gordon Plastering, Inc. not appearing.

Plaintiff's request to proceed on the Declarations of BRADLEY C. CROSLEY and MELISSA BROWN IS DENIED.

Court orders matter continued to Jul-19-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 505 for hearing. Plaintiff is ordered to have a witness available and file an itemization regrading attorney fees.

After review of the case, the Court further finds that Plaintiff has not proved that the final outstanding balance was sent to Defendant.
